nodes.label: claudeuplift0 Rev 5 V3 arc driver

evidenceRequirements.description: Final closeout document; driver completes last.

nodes.runbook: Use workgraph-arc-operator. Drive only this statically seeded Rev5 V3 graph. The exact committed bytes, expectedContentSha256, selected variant, and fresh Director proof must already have passed work-416 before seed. V3 includes pB2_selfheal, pA_traction, and pA_tool_actuator; it omits no optional nodes; never add nodes ad hoc. Complete last after closeout.

references.ref: Fresh post-Rev5 Director Decision must bind the selected committed blueprint path, blob id, SHA-256, complete node-set preview, and seed expectedContentSha256; verifier work-416 verifies the resolved proof before any live seed.

nodes.label: canonical published artifact prerequisite

evidenceRequirements.description: Exact corrective closeout/admission report proving canonical published bytes, registry-seeded uniform fleet, bug-297 resolution, and independent successor verifier PASS.

nodes.runbook: Use workgraph-arc-participant. Fail closed until mission-123 is complete, bug-297 is resolved from registry-only reproduction, published artifacts bind canonical gitHead/integrity, OIS and all target caches are registry-seeded, the fleet is uniform, and the independent successor gates PASS. Author the exact admission report separately. Claim/start this gate and call complete_work with no executor evidence bound to artifact_admission; the verifier-attestation hard fence must park the leaf in review. An independent verifier reads the report and calls attest_evidence on artifact_admission using a load-bearing related entity ref (the target Mission/mission-123) plus the report in the note. Only verifier PASS advances done. Do not implement uplift features here.

nodes.label: Director variant resolution admission

evidenceRequirements.description: Fresh post-Rev5 Director Decision proof binding this exact committed variant path/blob/SHA-256, complete node set, and expectedContentSha256 seed identity.

nodes.runbook: Fresh-read the post-Rev5 Decision and its Director-grade proof. It must bind this exact variant path, git commit, git blob, file SHA-256, complete node-set preview, and the expectedContentSha256 used at seed. Author a separate rail-admission report. Claim/start this gate and call complete_work with no executor evidence bound to rail_admission; the verifier-attestation hard fence must park the leaf in review. An independent verifier reads the report and calls attest_evidence using a load-bearing related entity ref (the target Idea/idea-584) plus the report/Decision proof in the note. Any unresolved, pre-byte, mismatched, ambiguous, or non-Director-grade state blocks. Decision-26 is disposed and forbidden.

references.ref: Fresh post-Rev5 Director Decision must bind the selected committed blueprint path, blob id, SHA-256, complete node-set preview, and seed expectedContentSha256; verifier work-416 verifies the resolved proof before any live seed.

nodes.label: synthetic schema-drift fixture

evidenceRequirements.description: Fresh test run proving param-level mid-session schema drift and omitted-required-argument cases are deterministic.

nodes.runbook: Build only the reusable deterministic test fixture derived from bug-298/Greg-Ruby reproduction. It must distinguish session-init snapshot from fresh disk schema and cover param-level changes. No production behavior change.

nodes.label: E additive/lazy schema evolution

evidenceRequirements.description: Fresh tests prove a pre-change session does not hard-stall during the grace window after a synthetic required-param evolution.

nodes.runbook: Implement the Hub additive-only/lazily-enforced work-verb schema evolution contract with a bounded grace window and explicit rollback. Never weaken authority or fabricate semantic values.

nodes.label: D dispatch drift tolerance

evidenceRequirements.description: Fresh tests prove safe-default backfill only where declared and precise actionable failure otherwise; no hard stall.

nodes.runbook: Implement dispatch-time argument-vs-fresh-schema comparison in shared core. Backfill only explicitly declared safe defaults; otherwise return a precise actionable error. Feature-flag rollback.

nodes.label: C-minimal session-init drift alert

evidenceRequirements.description: Fresh tests prove param-level mid-session harmful drift produces an actionable notification and stable schema produces no alert.

nodes.runbook: Implement alert-grade detection anchored to the session-init tool snapshot, never readServedRevision. Emit through notification-surface; automatic restart is permitted only through the bounded included pB2_selfheal path in V3.

nodes.label: upstream tools/list_changed track

evidenceRequirements.description: Document binding upstream issue/status and confirming the adapter still emits tools/list_changed correctly.

nodes.runbook: Pursue or refresh the upstream host issue for tools/list_changed. This is tracking, not a claim that the host fix landed. Preserve adapter behavior.

nodes.label: Claude swarm footer census

evidenceRequirements.description: Fresh tests/live harness run prove honest read-only peer, Hub FSM, and needs-you rendering with failure-state honesty.

nodes.runbook: Implement the additive Claude statusLine census using read-only Hub state and the PI footer honesty cascade. Never fabricate health and never mutate Hub state.

nodes.label: schema-change frequency calibration

evidenceRequirements.description: Reproducible bounded measurement of harmful schema-change frequency and C-full break-even assumptions.

nodes.runbook: Measure param-level/harmful tool-schema change frequency from bounded repository/Hub history without transcript surveillance. This measures the assumptions for the bounded pB2_selfheal path included in V3.

nodes.label: estate config provenance

evidenceRequirements.description: Canonical commit making estate configuration repo-auditable.

nodes.runbook: Move the bounded estate configuration source of truth into reviewable repository provenance with rollback documentation.

nodes.label: network-adapter pin unification

evidenceRequirements.description: Canonical commit replacing floating/latest network-adapter bootstrap with one explicit pin across harnesses.

nodes.runbook: Unify network-adapter bootstrap pins across Claude and PI; remove @latest drift while preserving explicit rollback.

nodes.label: disk-backed SpecStore

evidenceRequirements.description: Fresh cold-restart test proves specs persist and restore without stale or corrupt state.

nodes.runbook: Implement the declared SpecPersistencePort with bounded disk persistence, migration/rollback behavior, and cold-start durability tests.

nodes.label: Claude skill hot-reload precondition probe

evidenceRequirements.description: Fresh controlled harness run records whether Claude re-reads skills mid-session.

nodes.runbook: Probe only the host skill hot-reload precondition. Record PASS or FAIL as test evidence. Do not conditionally implement a watcher inside this node; a PASS may justify a separately designed successor arc, while FAIL records pre-stage-only behavior.

nodes.label: OpenCode declarative manifest cleanup

evidenceRequirements.description: Canonical commit adding declarative OpenCode manifest and removing architect-hub prompt fossil.

nodes.runbook: Co-deliver the bounded OpenCode manifest and prompt fossil removal; no unrelated overhaul.

nodes.label: escalation citation resolver

evidenceRequirements.description: Canonical commit adding path:line provenance to escalation logs.

nodes.runbook: Implement idea-582's bounded path:line citation resolver with redaction and failure honesty.

nodes.label: C-full bounded worker self-heal

evidenceRequirements.description: Fresh soak tests prove worker-only bounded restart/resume, jitter/rolling behavior, driver fallback, stable-schema quietness, and loop guards.

nodes.runbook: Implement only the separately admitted C-full worker self-heal: worker-local restart/resume, jitter and rolling limits, driver/architect fallback, stable-schema soak, and loop guard. No fleet-wide blind restart.

nodes.label: current-host tools/list_changed traction proof

evidenceRequirements.description: Fresh controlled current-host run proves the host re-enumerates tools mid-session after tools/list_changed; negative evidence cannot unlock ToolActuator.

nodes.runbook: Reproduce positive host traction already bound by the V2/V3 Director Decision. A negative result completes no implementation admission: block pA_tool_actuator and return to a new Decision/design revision. Do not infer support from adapter emission alone.

nodes.label: ToolActuator consumer after positive host traction

evidenceRequirements.description: Canonical implementation commit consuming the neutral control plane only after independently reproduced positive current-host traction.

nodes.runbook: Implement ToolActuator only as a consumer of the neutral control plane after pA_traction independently reproduces positive current-host re-enumeration. It is not a standalone visibility cure; preserve rollback and no authority expansion.

nodes.label: stable independent PI verifier gate

evidenceRequirements.description: Independent binary PASS/FAIL report reproducing every node's evidence and checking V3 complete optional set and anti-scope.

nodes.runbook: Use independent PI verifier posture. Reproduce load-bearing tests and inspect canonical commits. Confirm artifact_gate and rail_gate were each advanced only by valid verifier attestations; confirm the fresh Decision bound this exact variant path/blob/SHA-256 and complete node set; confirm expectedContentSha256 matched at seed; police omissions and anti-scope. Author no remediation.

references.ref: Fresh post-Rev5 Director Decision must bind the selected committed blueprint path, blob id, SHA-256, complete node-set preview, and seed expectedContentSha256; verifier work-416 verifies the resolved proof before any live seed.

nodes.label: claudeuplift0 closeout

evidenceRequirements.description: Closeout reconciling graph, PRs, evidence, verifier verdict, residuals, rollback, and Director variant.

nodes.runbook: Use workgraph-arc-closeout. Close only the finite V3 graph. V3 includes pB2_selfheal, pA_traction, and pA_tool_actuator; no optional track is omitted. Preserve FAILs and reconcile bugs, ideas, and Decisions.

references.ref: Fresh post-Rev5 Director Decision must bind the selected committed blueprint path, blob id, SHA-256, complete node-set preview, and seed expectedContentSha256; verifier work-416 verifies the resolved proof before any live seed.
